abilities.name: From Shadow
abilities.text: This model is deployed during the start phase of turn 1 anywhere on the table, not within 2" of a Strategy marker or enemy deployment zone.

abilities.name: Spy Network
abilities.text: This model may draw range and LoS for its actions from friendly Camerabot models within 8", ignoring LoS.

abilities.name: Stealth
abilities.text: While more than 6" away from this model, enemy models cannot target it and ignore it when drawing LoS.

actions.name: Minor Annoyance
actions.effects: Target must either gain an Entranced token or be dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Smile, You're On Camera
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Target declares the Interact action controlled by this model.

actions.name: Get a Better Angle
actions.effects: Summon a Camerabot in base contact with the target, then if the target was friendly, remove the target. If the target was enemy and this action received a raise, remove the target.
